intro.title: Select water protection level
intro.p1: Some structural situations require the installation of mobile flood protection. The AquaLOCK® Quickwall panel was designed precisely for this purpose.
intro.p2: It consists of fixed slats and is available up to a maximum protection height of 1.6 m, depending on the opening width.

width.label: Opening width (mm)
width.error: Please enter a valid width between 800 mm and 3000 mm.

height.label: Protection height (mm)
height.required: Please select a protection height before continuing.
height.none: No protection heights are available for this width.

installation.title: Installation type
installation.description: The AquaLOCK® Quickwall panel can be installed either in front of or between the reveal, depending on the structural situation.

locking.title: Locking lever layout
locking.description: The removable locking lever can be positioned either on the left or right side of the door without extra cost.

intro.highlight: Solutions for wide openings with a center post or corner mounting
intro.p1: Multiple AquaLOCK® Quickwall panels can be connected using a fixed central post (width: 60 mm) where a higher level of protection is required, e.g. 2.5 m wide × 1 m high. The central post is inserted into a stainless steel sleeve embedded in concrete and fixed with an integrated screw. Quickwall panels are then mounted on each side of the post to create a stable and secure barrier.
intro.p2: For corner applications, a special corner post can be used to join two Quickwall panels at an angle, providing a seamless and strong corner installation.

example.title: Example how to calculate the correct width of the Quickwall panels
example.p: You want to protect a 2,400 mm wide garage door at a height of 1,500 mm. The maximum width at that protection height is 1,100 mm, which is not enough to use only 2 panels — so you have to take 3 panels and 2 center posts.

included.title: Included at no extra cost
included.description: As a special anniversary offer, the assembly kit is included free of charge. The corner profiles are part of this assembly kit. Only the colour coating of the profiles carries an additional charge.

bottomPlate.title: Bottom plate
bottomPlate.description: The bottom plate is mandatory and is included automatically according to the number of Quickwall panels selected.

cornerProfiles.title: Corner profiles colour coating
cornerProfiles.description: Corner profiles are included as part of the assembly kit. You can optionally add RAL colour coating at an extra charge.

hooks.title: Hooks for storing the Quickwall panel
hooks.description: Hooks for hanging and storing the panels.
